title: OJCP AgentDeclaration
description: Schema for agent self-identification when initiating applications. Enables employer audit trails, rate limiting, and abuse prevention.

agent_id.description: Reverse-domain-notation identifier for the agent (e.g., com.apple.intelligence.jobseeker).

agent_version.description: Version string of the agent software.

acting_on_behalf_of.description: Who the agent is acting on behalf of.

user_consent_token.description: Optional token representing user or operator authorization. For 'autonomous' interaction modes, this represents the operator's authorization rather than per-action user consent. Token format and verification are provider-defined.

interaction_mode.description: How the agent interacts with the user during the apply flow. 'assisted' = user confirms key steps, 'autonomous' = fully hands-off, 'supervised' = user monitors but does not intervene.
